message:
perf(session): use split_off for pending entries; remove unnecessary Box in index dispatcher

session.rs: Replace `.to_vec()` on the pending entries slice with
`split_off`, avoiding per-entry clone cost. The split_off call is
deferred until after full hydration succeeds, preserving fail-safe
behavior on early-return errors. Reformat the `pending_start`
computation for line-length compliance.

session_index.rs: Change `IndexUpdateCommand::Enqueue` from wrapping
`Box<PendingIndexUpdate>` to owning `PendingIndexUpdate` directly.
PendingIndexUpdate is small enough that the Box indirection adds
unnecessary allocation overhead on the enqueue path without providing
cache or size benefits. Remove the corresponding Box::new on send and
destructure on receive.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
